title: Keep tied embeddings in fp32
author: LJX2017

data.description: Keeps the tied token embedding / output head weights as fp32 master parameters during training, casting to bf16 only at compute time.
Aligns tied embeddings with the existing fp32-master treatment used for linear weights in both CUDA and MLX trainers.

novel_contributions: Keeps tok_emb.weight as an fp32 master parameter in both CUDA and MLX trainers
Casts embedding activations and tied-head weights back to bf16 only at compute time
Aligns tied embeddings with the fp32-master handling already used for linear weights
Improves local smoke validation while keeping the compressed artifact essentially unchanged
